name: Executive Candidate
title: Principal Solutions Architect / Technical Project Manager
summary: Accomplished and forward-thinking Principal Solutions Architect and Technical Project Manager with over 16 years of leadership in design, development, and deployment of large-scale distributed enterprise systems. Expert in architecting high-throughput backend services, integrating advanced Generative AI/RAG automation systems, and managing DevOps cloud infrastructure. Demonstrated success in leading cross-functional teams to deliver secure, resilient, and highly scalable cloud-native products.
